evidence: "Family friendly show. Have re watched all the way through several times."
"Plot is fine and follow able for children yet deep and thoughtful enough for adults."
"Feels very very rushed, especially at the end almost as if it was meant to be a longer series."
"A bit too predictable in places. Feels very very rushed, especially at the end..."
"Not as smart as the others. Could have been much better."
"Acting is wonderful and Maggie smith is fantastic as always."
"Quality, color and aesthetic look very much like the episodes 1-3 Star Wars prequels but not in the bad ways."
"Loved the show and actually really didn't like this episode."
"Not the best follow through or execution overall but not a waste of time either."
"Gives fans everything they need in this episode."

summary: The user enjoys family-friendly films and shows with strong visual elements and high production quality. They appreciate simple narratives that evoke positive emotions but have mixed feelings about pacing and brand loyalty.
